hero.title: CODE. RUN. REPEAT.
hero.subtitle: Building software by day. Building endurance by night. A data-driven approach to high-performance living.

about.headline: The intersection of Logic & Grit.
about.body: I believe that the discipline required to debug complex distributed systems is the same discipline needed to push through mile 22 of a marathon. My approach to both is clinical, iterative, and relentless.

cards.title: Data-driven Training
cards.body: Treating heart rate variability and VO2 Max like server latency. Constant monitoring, constant adjustment.

cards.title: Habit System
cards.body: Building a training protocol that runs on autopilot. Removing decision fatigue through algorithmic consistency.

cards.title: Performance Tools
cards.body: Custom scripts and open-source stacks to visualize Strava data and predict peak race-day readiness.

posts.title: Training Strategies for the Async Engineer
posts.excerpt: How to balance high-focus coding sessions with zone 2 aerobic base building.

posts.title: The 2024 Tech Stack for Runners
posts.excerpt: Reviewing the sensors and software that actually provide actionable insights.

posts.title: Refactoring My Running Form
posts.excerpt: Applying engineering principles to biomechanical optimization and injury prevention.

newsletter.title: JOIN THE DEV RUNNERS COMMUNITY
newsletter.subtitle: Weekly insights on performance, tech, and the marathon mindset. No spam, just pure data.
